runtime_assets.name: 劍士 Rank 1
runtime_assets.technical_spec: 96x96 cells; 8 rows; 6/8/8/8/4/8 frames; root (48,82); RGBA PNG
runtime_assets.issue: Integrated; verify foot-anchor drift, action-to-action scale, crop, and silhouette readability.
runtime_assets.next_action: Run shared validator and Phaser action proof; close only after visual QA.
runtime_assets.acceptance: No empty/cropped frames, direction mismatch, visible foot slide, or action-scale jump.

runtime_assets.name: 弓手 Rank 1
runtime_assets.technical_spec: Humanoid 96x96 contract; bow handedness fixed; arrow/projectile separate.
runtime_assets.next_action: Produce identity turnaround, then one action strip per direction.
runtime_assets.acceptance: All eight directions readable; release frame aligns with projectile timing.

runtime_assets.name: 法師 Rank 1
runtime_assets.technical_spec: Humanoid 96x96 contract; staff/book geometry locked; spell VFX separate.
runtime_assets.next_action: Produce identity turnaround and cast strips; deliver separate spell VFX.
runtime_assets.acceptance: Cast release reads clearly without baked effects obscuring the body.

runtime_assets.name: 服事 Rank 1
runtime_assets.technical_spec: Humanoid 96x96 contract; support silhouette; healing VFX separate.
runtime_assets.next_action: Lock support silhouette and directional cast pose.
runtime_assets.acceptance: Cast pose reads in all directions; no baked target marker.

runtime_assets.name: 盜賊 Rank 1
runtime_assets.technical_spec: Humanoid 96x96 contract; fixed dual-weapon handedness; compact anticipation/recovery.
runtime_assets.next_action: Approve identity turnaround with dual-weapon handedness locked.
runtime_assets.acceptance: Attack never swaps hands or crops outside the cell.

runtime_assets.name: 嫩芽軟泥 Rank 1
runtime_assets.technical_spec: 96x96 creature contract; 8 rows; root (48,82); preserve body volume.
runtime_assets.issue: No source art; creature envelope needs approval.
runtime_assets.next_action: Approve identity turnaround and squash/stretch envelope before animation.
runtime_assets.acceptance: Face/crown identity and body volume remain stable across directions.

runtime_assets.name: 苔芽獸
runtime_assets.next_action: Produce first monster set as pipeline reference.
runtime_assets.acceptance: Spawn, walk, hit, and death remain distinct at 50% display scale.

runtime_assets.name: 針翅蟲
runtime_assets.technical_spec: 96x96; 8 rows; stable body center; no floor shadow.
runtime_assets.next_action: Animate clean flight loop and directional attack.
runtime_assets.acceptance: Flight reads over dark/green tiles and never implies ground contact.

runtime_assets.name: 紫帽菇
runtime_assets.technical_spec: 96x96; 8 rows; cap silhouette and stem scale locked.
runtime_assets.next_action: Lock cap/stem proportions before action animation.
runtime_assets.acceptance: Cap size and body scale do not drift between directions.

runtime_assets.name: 頁岩巨像
runtime_assets.technical_spec: 96x96 or approved 128x128 large envelope; 8 rows; heavy contact timing.
runtime_assets.issue: No source art; envelope size requires approval.
runtime_assets.next_action: Approve 96 or 128 cell envelope and weapon crop budget.
runtime_assets.acceptance: Body/weapon never crops and scale supports the boss hierarchy.

runtime_assets.name: 燭角巫獸
runtime_assets.technical_spec: 96x96; 8 rows; projectile and impact separate; declared release origin.
runtime_assets.next_action: Define projectile origin and directional release frame.
runtime_assets.acceptance: Release frame is unambiguous and aligns with the runtime projectile.

runtime_assets.name: 荒角王獸
runtime_assets.technical_spec: Prefer 128x128 if needed; 8 rows; explicit anchor/display scale.
runtime_assets.issue: No source art; boss envelope and crop budget need approval.
runtime_assets.next_action: Approve boss turnaround, cell size, crop budget, and HUD portrait.
runtime_assets.acceptance: Visually dominant without hiding nearby actors or health UI.

runtime_assets.name: 木石路障
runtime_assets.technical_spec: Recommended 128x128 RGBA; bottom-center root; transparent; one-tile footprint.
runtime_assets.issue: No source art; runtime supports static-sprite replacement.
runtime_assets.next_action: Deliver intact PNG first, then damaged/debris states.
runtime_assets.acceptance: Occupied tile and damage state remain obvious at mobile size.

runtime_assets.name: 弩箭塔
runtime_assets.technical_spec: Recommended 128x128 RGBA; bottom-center root; projectile separate.
runtime_assets.issue: No source art; muzzle origin not documented.
runtime_assets.next_action: Deliver static base and document muzzle origin.
runtime_assets.acceptance: Fits one tile and projectile origin aligns with the art.
